title: lastrea intermedia var. rhodolepis
intro: Lastrea intermedia var. rhodolepis, also known as the Rhodolepis fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rhodolepis fern include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Rhodolepis fern can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
